name: EIDP, Inc.
sic_description: Plastic Material, Synth Resin/Rubber, Cellulos (No Glass)
summary: Part I Historical DuPont was founded in 1802 and was incorporated in Delaware in 1915. Today, Historical DuPont is helping customers find solutions to capitalize on areas of growing global demand enabling more, safer, nutritious food; creating high-performance, cost-effective and energy efficient materials for a wide range of industries; and increasingly delivering renewably sourced bio-based materials and fuels.
